name: praxis-pta
description: Praxis domain pack for Pulsar Timing Arrays (nanohertz gravitational-wave background). Ships a provenance-stamped, re-derivable cache of the 2023 PTA GWB-evidence release set (NANOGrav 15yr, EPTA DR2) with IPTA DR2 cross-PTA context. Oracle tier REDERIVE: no live catalog API; values are served from a cited Zenodo/journal-DOI snapshot, never recalled.
